note: Tagline options for the email signature widget. Pulled from the talk's load-bearing lines.

taglines.text: Both hands full. That's the only honest place to stand.
The tool is never neutral. But neither are we.
Pick up the tool. Use it wrong. Share what you learn.
Any dead fish can float downstream. It takes a live fish to swim.
Generation is free now. Taste is what's scarce.
Speed without judgment is a leaf blower.
Stop saying bias. Name what you're seeing.
Remix has culture. Extraction has appetite.
If your values aren't in text, to AI they don't exist.
We need the most critical voices at the table.
Both statements are true. At the exact same time.
